description_long: This object consists of a pair of ergonomically shaped handheld controllers, each featuring a prominent circular ring at the top and a contoured grip below. The rings are decorated with bold, angular white patterns on a black background, suggesting a modern, high-tech aesthetic. The grips are matte black and appear to be designed for comfortable, secure handling, likely with textured surfaces for better grip. On the underside of each controller, there are visible buttons and possibly a trigger, indicating interactive functionality. The overall design is symmetrical, with both units mirroring each other, and the size suggests they are intended to be held in each hand. These controllers are typical of those used for virtual reality or gaming systems, where precise hand tracking and input are required.
description: A pair of black and white handheld electronic controllers with circular rings and ergonomic grips, featuring interactive buttons and a modern design.
description_view_0: Front view showing the circular rings and the contoured grips of both controllers, with the white patterns clearly visible.
description_view_1: Side view highlighting the thickness of the rings and the elongated, ergonomic handles extending backward.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying the underside of the rings and the button layout on the bottom of each controller.
description_view_3: Opposite side view, similar to view 1, showing the other profile of the controllers and the continuation of the white pattern.
